title: crotalaria kodaiensis
intro: Crotalaria kodaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. Native to Sri Lanka, it is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria kodaiensis include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria kodaiensis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
